Public Service
What to do Segments What’s trending Leaders Careers
What to do Segments What’s trending Leaders Careers

Public sector consulting

Public Services today for stronger communities tomorrow. Facing limited resources, increasingly rapid technology advances and a state of permacrisis, public service organizations who embrace continuous change can have meaningful impact on outcomes for individuals and entire communities.

Public service now

200%

increase in global disruption since 2017

1 in 4

central government workers across OECD countries were aged 55 or over in 2020

36%

of people we surveyed in 10 countries say government agency processes and interactions are intuitive

Resiliency for better mission outcomes

Now is the perfect opportunity for leaders of government agencies to reimagine their operations to build resiliency and deliver better outcomes for all.

Learn more

How to reinvent public service

Close
Cloud and digital platforms

Build a technology infrastructure that evolves to serve changing public needs

Legacy infrastructure cannot keep pace with change. Adopt cloud technology to deliver value faster and future proof public services.
Learn more
Cloud and digital platforms

Build a technology infrastructure that evolves to serve changing public needs

Legacy infrastructure cannot keep pace with change. Adopt cloud technology to deliver value faster and future proof public services.
Learn more
Close
Citizen experience

Design services for people, not agencies

53% of citizens are frustrated with public services. Prioritize secure and personalized services to build community trust and confidence.
Learn more
Citizen experience

Design services for people, not agencies

53% of citizens are frustrated with public services. Prioritize secure and personalized services to build community trust and confidence.
Learn more
Close
Sustainability

Lead the way to more sustainable communities

As policy stewards, public sector has a significant role to create a more sustainable future. Don’t just keep pace, lead the race to net zero.
Learn more
Sustainability

Lead the way to more sustainable communities

As policy stewards, public sector has a significant role to create a more sustainable future. Don’t just keep pace, lead the race to net zero.
Learn more
Close
Talent and Workforce transformation

Build the public service and community workforces of tomorrow

Public sector needs to transform its own work processes, and support businesses and communities. Prioritize upskilling, restructure work and navigate economic shifts to build an inclusive and resilient future.
Learn more
Talent and Workforce transformation

Build the public service and community workforces of tomorrow

Public sector needs to transform its own work processes, and support businesses and communities. Prioritize upskilling, restructure work and navigate economic shifts to build an inclusive and resilient future.
Learn more
Close
Back Office Transformation

Improve efficiency with an intelligent back office

With budgetary constraints and limited resources, public service organizations need to transform the back office. Take a holistic approach to people, processes and technology to boost performance.
Back Office Transformation

Improve efficiency with an intelligent back office

With budgetary constraints and limited resources, public service organizations need to transform the back office. Take a holistic approach to people, processes and technology to boost performance.
Close
Security

Boost cybersecurity to protect data and build public trust

Public service organizations manage sensitive data and are at risk of targeted cyberattacks. Adopt strong cybersecurity measures to prevent threats and maintain public trust.
Learn more
Security

Boost cybersecurity to protect data and build public trust

Public service organizations manage sensitive data and are at risk of targeted cyberattacks. Adopt strong cybersecurity measures to prevent threats and maintain public trust.
Learn more
Close
Data and Artificial Intelligence

Elevate public services with data and AI solutions

Integrate data and AI to boost decision-making, streamline operations and to better serve the communities.
Learn more
Data and Artificial Intelligence

Elevate public services with data and AI solutions

Integrate data and AI to boost decision-making, streamline operations and to better serve the communities.

Segments we support

  • US federal government
    US federal government

    US federal government

    Design and deliver the next generation of government services and improve citizen experiences.

  • Social services
    Social services

    Social services

    Become more agile and responsive with digitally-enabled services that have users at the heart to deliver better outcomes.

  • Defense
    Defense

    Defense

    Think about innovation as a capability and become future ready while delivering mission outcomes, now.

  • Cities, transportation and infrastructure
    Cities, transportation and infrastructure

    Cities, transportation and infrastructure

    Work towards a greener and more connected future.

  • Revenue
    Revenue

    Revenue

    Ensure efficient, fair tax and revenue enforcement and collection.

  • Public safety
    Public safety

    Public safety

    Adopt a preventative approach and enable a new era of public safety.

  • Education
    Education

    Education

    Create new ways to connect and learn. Education is being transformed from a place to a platform.

  • Border services
    Border services

    Border services

    Be more collaborative, connected and intelligent and create new ways to enable seamless and secure travel and trade.

  • Public health
    Public health

    Public health

    Use data-driven insights to deliver outcomes for state and local communities affordably, efficiently and with equity.

  • Post & parcel
    Post & parcel

    Post & parcel

    Sustainability of the last mile is a key competitive advantage. Embrace digital transformation to accelerate growth and great service.

  • Nonprofit
    Nonprofit

    Nonprofit

    Tap into innovative digital technologies to better deliver your mission and meet constituents’ expectations.

What’s trending in public service

View all work
Research Report
Reimagining Public Services: Why experience is everything

Modernization isn’t just about adding tools—it’s about ensuring great experiences for residents and those who serve them. Agencies that align technology with human needs turn digital investments into enduring public value.

Expand
Case Study
Equipping UNICEF to harness AI for good

How technology is supporting the agency’s mission to protect and empower children worldwide. 

Expand
Announcement
Accenture & AWS Accelerate AI and Cloud Modernization

Accenture and AWS join forces to accelerate AI-driven reinvention and cloud modernization for public service organizations worldwide.

Expand
Research Report
Sovereign AI: From managing risk to accelerating growth

Sovereign AI isn’t just a control play—it’s a game-changer for global competitiveness and cultural value. Discover how organizations are moving fast to secure their advantage and shape AI’s future, following four bold moves.

Expand
Case Study
The birth of a new Smokefree era

How Technology is Transforming Maternal Health in Greater Manchester and Beyond

Expand
Research Report
Anchoring to digital operations: Why modernizing maritime ports matters

Collaboration across the maritime ecosystem is crucial, as partnerships between terminal operators, shipping lines and customs authorities can optimize operations and reduce bottlenecks.

Expand
Blog
The future of public service: Building trust in AI's influence and four trends to watch

We explore four key trends from our annual Technology Vision 2025 report that are set to reshape the public sector, and discuss the foundational tenets needed to be successful.

Expand
Case Study
Revolutionizing the UAE’s payment systems

The United Arab Emirates is embarking on a bold transition toward a connected, digital-first economy, reinventing its financial services ecosystem and positioning itself as a leading FinTech hub.

Expand
Case Study
The Connected Campus: Queensland University of Technology

Accenture is teaming with Queensland University of Technology to reinvent how they communicate, engage, support, attract and retain students throughout their higher education journey.

Expand
Case Study
Fighting poverty with technology and humanity: Gerando Falcões

Together, Gerando Falcões and Accenture are bringing hope to thousands in Brazil.

Expand

Awards and recognition

Accenture named a Leader in Worldwide AI Services for State & Local Government

Accenture is named a Leader in the IDC MarketScape: Worldwide AI Services for State & Local Government 2025 Vendor Assessment.

Read more

Accenture named a Leader in Worldwide AI Services for National Civilian Government

Accenture is named a Leader in the IDC MarketScape: Worldwide AI Services for National Civilian Government 2025 Vendor Assessment.

Read more

Accenture named a Leader in Europe, Middle East and Africa Government Cloud Professional Services

Accenture is positioned as a Leader for both Capabilities and Strategies in the inaugural IDC MarketScape: Europe, Middle East and Africa Government Cloud Professional Services 2024–2025 Vendor Assessment.

Read more

Accenture named a Leader in North America State and Local Government Cloud Services

Accenture is named a Leader in inaugural IDC MarketScape: North America State and Local Government Cloud Professional Services 2024 Vendor Assessment.

Read more

Accenture named leader for Data-Driven Government

A leader in Professional Services for Data-Driven Government based on its capabilities to help public sector clients use data and intelligence to improve policymaking, service delivery and operational efficiency.

Learn more

Accenture named a Leader in Higher Education Cloud Professional Services

Accenture is named a Leader in IDC MarketScape: Worldwide Higher Education Cloud Professional Services 2024 Vendor Assessment

Read more
